compounds.frequency: daily, early morning on empty stomach

benefits.description: enhanced memory recall with vivid, detailed memories flooding in; improved focus for creative projects
sustained mental energy for large projects

side_effects.description: diminishing effects over time; effectiveness seemed to slow down after extended use
constantly zoning out about events from years ago becomes tedious and intrusive after prolonged use

protocol_notes: Took 1 mg daily for 2-4 weeks at a time, with 8-week cycle attempted once. Took during weekdays, off on weekends. Used selectively for high-demand cognitive tasks. Experienced synergy with ADHD baseline symptoms (hyperfocus). Reported enhanced sensory perception (taste, smell, auditory, visual) of memories. No observable impairment to external observers.
